transcript.text: Hello, so this is a request video. I wanted me to show my whole rider on the roller setup.
I filmed this last night, but somehow I didn't record.

If I had known about it, I would have preferred to get the LeMond because it doesn't even use a back wheel, the LeMond.
I think it's just as they're more realistic to the road, you know, but this one is pretty good too.

You know, the LeMond wouldn't, you know, wear your tires, but this is a real good one to have if you just want to, you know, if you use the bike also and you want to take it off because you can take it off really quick.
You just flip this and then it just pops right off.
This falls off and your bike falls off though, so you need to have a strap here.
And this didn't come with a strap, so I don't know why, but it works great if you make it tight and you keep it like that with a strap.
And so here's the table. This is just looking at it from a distance here.

I didn't have to cut it and it was perfect.
That was pretty awesome. I think anyways.
No, no, actually I cut it a little bit, but let's see.
It's 59 1⁄2 inches high, which is 150 centimeters.
And then the width here is 32 inches, 82 centimeters.
And then the depth is 24 1⁄2 inches or 63 centimeters.
This is a particle board and it's just this piece of particle board that I happen to have.

And then I glued it here.

But you can lean forward a little bit, you know, so that's about right.
